_comment: Video banner carousel. Each ad is a full-bleed muted autoplay .mp4 (the actual creative — no overlay text on top). Set the .mp4 URL in `video`. Optionally provide a poster image (first frame) so the slide paints instantly before the video buffers. Replace the placeholder URLs below with your real Wix CDN URLs (format: https://video.wixstatic.com/video/<hash>/720p/mp4/file.mp4) or repo-local files.

schema.advertiser: shown as 'Sponsored · X' in the bottom-right corner
schema.videoWebm: optional .webm alternate for smaller file size
schema.poster: optional first-frame image (paints instantly while video buffers)

ads.campaign: PLACEHOLDER — swap this for a real Wix CDN .mp4
PLACEHOLDER — swap this for a real Wix CDN .mp4
